ereefs 3.3.0

  • Changelog

    Retry wrapper around `ncdf4::ncvar_get()`

    safe_ncvar_get.Rd

    This legacy helper retries `ncdf4::ncvar_get()` when reading from remote HTTPS/OPeNDAP-served NetCDF files. It is retained for backward compatibility with older workflows that still rely on the `ncdf4` stack.

    safe_ncvar_get(
  nc,
  varid = NA,
  start = NA,
  count = NA,
  verbose = FALSE,
  signedbyte = TRUE,
  collapse_degen = TRUE,
  raw_datavals = FALSE,
  tries = 20
)

    Arguments

    nc

    Open `ncdf4` handle.

    varid, start, count, verbose, signedbyte, collapse_degen, raw_datavals

    Passed through to [ncdf4::ncvar_get()].

    tries

    Maximum number of retry iterations for remote files.

    Value

    The value returned by [ncdf4::ncvar_get()].

    Contents

    Developed by Barbara Robson.
